hotel_name: LondonHouse Chicago, Curio Collection by Hilton

reviews.title: Wonderful First Impression to Chicago
reviews.text:
The LH location is fantastic, and the staff, always friendly and ready to assist, made our stay even more enjoyable.  

We booked a one-bedroom King Vista Suite, which featured floor-to-ceiling windows that offered stunning views of the river—absolutely fantastic! The room was well-appointed and clean. I highly recommend reserving a table at the LH Rooftop Bar for fabulous drinks and even more beautiful views.

reviews.title: We didn’t stay here they basically told us to fuck off
reviews.positives: It was there I guess
reviews.negatives: Not listed that it was 21+ check in upon arrival the staff was not understanding and unwilling to help on Christmas Eve

reviews.title: The location of the accommodation is really great.
reviews.text: The location of the accommodation is very good, and the size of the accommodation is suitable for two people. The price is a bit high, but if you prioritize location, I recommend this place. The heating and water pressure in the shower are somewhat ambiguous. The amenities are just at a basic level. Free bottled water is only available for Hilton Honors members, and for larger bottles, you have to buy them, so keep this in mind. Also, if you want a better view, you need to pay an additional $60, but if your purpose is just traveling, you don't necessarily need to add that.

reviews.title: Waste of money
reviews.positives: Great view and nice rooms.  That’s it.
reviews.negatives: Staff treats you like you’re not a guest.  The whole property is marketed and monetized to people who don’t stay there.  The roof is packed with outsiders.   The lobby bar area completely reserved for outsiders.  Waste of money.  Just go early in the morning and snap a view from the rooftop if you want a photo. Otherwise save your money

reviews.title: Nice place to enjoy Chicago.
reviews.text: Great location. Nice view. Clean room. Great rooftop restaurant.

reviews.title: Asked to switch room after upgrading and was told we couldn’t. We wanted to be refunded because my girlfriend and I didn
reviews.positives: I liked the location. It was close to work
reviews.negatives: I wanted to be checked in early, my room wasn’t available which was fine. I paid the Upgrade fee and checked in at 2pm. I didn’t like that my room wasn’t available which facing the Trump towers. My Girlfriend and I asked to be switched or wanted my money back, but was told by the front desk that wasn’t an option. So we spent an uncomfortable even with our blinds closed unable to enjoy our even and spent over $400 for one night in a room we couldn’t even enjoy.

reviews.title: Really good view
reviews.text: Good experience

reviews.title: Staff tried to up-sell us at the registration which went slowly. The room was poorly designed in so
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: Staff tried to up-sell us at the registration which went slowly. The room was poorly designed in so many ways for two guests. Glassware in the room was not clean and never cleaned despite several requests. Some towels had shredded edges. I was virbaly and harshly admonished on the roof for using a camera (which I always carry) to take a photo of the view inspire of there being NO signage or any other indication not to take photos except with a smartphone.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text: This place is very accessible to the tourist spots in Chi town. Their elegant rooms are very nice and comfortable. Staff are friendly and very accommodating. Plus the stunning view from the river side room is breathless.

reviews.title: I like the city
reviews.positives: I like everything except the part where my card was charge and the staff told me my card decline. They reported that they never received payment from booking. Com.
reviews.negatives: I like the property

reviews.title: Recommendation
reviews.text: I recommend it, but there are a few disappointing points. We purchased the city view for a higher price, but one of the two rooms was adjacent to a building, so there was no city view, just a wall, making the extra cost meaningless. Also, we went to use the rooftop bar, but the staff was very unfriendly, so we left. Aside from these two disappointing points, the front desk staff was very kind and accommodating to our requests, and we had a good time with our four-month-old baby and parents.

reviews.title: hope they doing better in the future
reviews.positives: location,
reviews.negatives: we were very disappointed from the experience the breakfast at the hotel, staff wasn't pay any attention , poor service, mix up order, we had to ask multiple times for the utensil and sugar and cream for the coffee, basic service hospitality. when we check in . it took them 40 minutes to find our reservation, poor experience,

reviews.title: Location is the best!! Highly recommended hotel.
reviews.text:
The hotel was conveniently located right across from Trump Tower, and most of the tourist attractions are on Michigan Ave, easily accessible from outside the hotel door. 

The downside was that it was very noisy at night with alternating sounds of police cars and motorcycles. I think it would be okay for someone who sleeps very soundly... The water pressure was low, but it's much better than Europe. It was clean, friendly, and in a good location... I was satisfied.

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Management and hospitality

reviews.title: Amazing room 9th floor
reviews.text:
Really busy hotel (weddings, meetings etc.)
We stayed at 9th floor, amazing view to the lake. Great location, it felt safe. We had a huge room & bathroom, comfy king bed, great ac, Nesspresso machine. Elevators fantastic & efficient. Will stay again for sure!

Cons- there wasn’t place outside for breakfast (it was closed) 
The receptionist  was rude a bit when check in, didn’t explain anything about the hotel and forgot to give us the basic info paper. Lucky us, we asked about the WiFi and then she’s just drop the paper quickly with no attitude.
Really expensive breakfast
reviews.room_type: 1 KING MOBILITY ACCESSIBLE W/ROLL IN SHOWER

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel with disappointing amenities!
reviews.positives: The room was very comfortable and the view was amazing. The location of the hotel was very conveniently located downtown and very close to all restaurants and shopping. The staff was very accommodating and helpful. Everyone had a smile and were eager to help with any request.
reviews.negatives: The hotel has a 5 star rating but the lack of a microwave was very unusual. Chicago has tons of food and coming back to the room and not being able to reheat your food was very disappointing. There is no microwave on the premises. Also, my vehicle was not eligible for "Valet" due to it being a high target vehicle for theft. The parking was a block away and Chicago had wintery weather during my stay. Very inconvenient and a hassle because the parking has to be paid every time you leave $$$ and walking downtown at night isn't the safest thing to do. Lastly, I paid for a breakfast included stay. When I let the server know, they advised me the breakfast was not fully included and it was only a $20 off voucher. The information about the stay was very misleading. For this to be a 5 star hotel this small inconveniences would prevent me from booking here in the future.

reviews.title: Checks all the boxes
reviews.text: Clean hotel, well-appointed room, great location and competitively-priced.

reviews.title: It was ok but the main reason for the stay was something that the hotel didn’t have
reviews.positives: The property was nice
reviews.negatives: I had problems with what I was told and felt like I was blown off when I said something about it

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: The room was smaller then I'm used to but was very clean. Nice view windows very small as well. Staff was amazing. Jessica at the front desk was a delight, you could hear her smile thur the phone, loved her! The valets were so accomadating and the young men when you walked in were nice as well. Great employees all around!!!

reviews.title: Tried it once would never stay here again!

reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.text: This is one of the best hotels I've been to so far and it's because of the way they welcome you and make you feel so special and not to mention the view from the room is absolutely amazinggg so I would def visit again!

reviews.title: great place if you got lucky with room
reviews.positives: overall stuff was very friendly, especially in bar/lounge area. great location, you can walk pretty much anywhere from there. rooftop also has great view, but unfortunately it was too cold to enjoy it
reviews.negatives: booked room with vista king room, during check-in receptionist said that they don't have it available and they can only give that room next day. next day they told me same story that room not available and should be ready for me next day. so in the the end I paid ~$1300 for expensive room and half of the stay had room which was twice cheaper. and as "compensation" got $60 bar credit... sounds like a poor "compensation"

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Apart from price. Everything is great

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.text: Beautiful, new space - very friendly staff and comfortable beds and rooms!

reviews.title: Nice but not amazing.
reviews.positives: Clean and good location
reviews.negatives:
They had guaranteed checkin in by 4. Got there at 3:55 and was told room wasn’t ready. We’re able to get into until 4:25. Just annoying because why advertise guaranteed check in when it’s not a thing?

Also our room was in the elevator well

reviews.title: A clean accommodation in a good location.
reviews.text: The accommodation was clean and the location was very good. It was nice to visit in winter, except for the dryness.

reviews.title: Awesome and will stay here again
reviews.positives: Location and amenities
reviews.negatives: Nothing, it was great

reviews.title: Location is perfect.
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my stay in Chicago. The location is perfect. The view was very good.

reviews.title: Make sure you don’t “accidentally” leave anything of value behind.
reviews.positives: Loved the location. The little bar with live music in the 2nd floor lobby area was nice. Loved that they had restaurants and bars in the hotel so we didn’t have to go outside much. Self-parking was on the very next block.
reviews.negatives: Did not like the staff at the hotel at all. No one seemed happy. The guest experience just was not there for me. The front desk employee was super bland at check-in. Left a $500 watch in the room. called 3 days straight and got the voicemail each time. once I finally spoke with "security," he told me that they did not find it and that it was my responsibility to ensure I had all my items when vacating the room. Well, DUH! But I would think it is the responsibility of the staff to be honest and turn in items that are accidentally left behind by guests.

reviews.title: Very good place
reviews.text: Very good place in my life

reviews.title: I hope it was a unique experience.  I may give another try asi like the location a lot
reviews.positives: The location is the best and it is very well decorated
reviews.negatives: They knew that there was a problem with hot water in the shower but still gave us the room. I ran out of hot water in the middle of the shower.  There was a welcome text from the manager which stated that we can contact with any problem. But when we text to the number, it was saying that the number does not work.

reviews.title: Only place to stay
reviews.text:
This hotel was exceptional. Perfect location, great restaurants and superb staff. 
Can’t wait to go back.

reviews.title: Ok, not great. Wouldn’t stay there again.
reviews.positives: Location was great, beautiful lobby with bar area. Staff was very nice, always pleasant. Ibrahim, the manager, was pleasant to work with in a less than ideal situation.
reviews.negatives: The room was just “meh” - nothing special or really “bougier” than at a Hampton. The TV initially had poor connection and was pixelated although they fixed as soon as we told the manager. They did not give us turn down service on the second night as requested (although to be fair they had a lot going on that day). Sometimes had to wait a long time for the elevators - you punch in your floor and it tells you which elevator you’ll take to get to that floor - was a bit weird to get used to at first but by the end of the first day it was fine. However a much bigger issue was that the hotel lost hot water on our second night there. Obviously most everyone was there for events and no one could shower - was very inconvenient especially for the per night cost of the room. Initially we were offered a $60 voucher for the rooftop bar as we booked through booking.com and were told by the hotel that due to the third party issue they could not compensate us back any credit (even though we paid at the hotel, not booking.com). For the voucher 1) it was perpetually busy at the rooftop and wait lines so unlikely we would even get a seat and 2) we had no time to use it before our departure the following day, plus I was with my 72 year old mom who does not drink. When I declined this they offered breakfast vouchers - again woefully inadequate given the situation and again, the cost of the room. Eventually I called booking.com who tried to reach the hotel with no luck so they sent an email to which the hotel has 24 hours to respond. In the meantime I was able to interact with the manager, Ibrahim, who did compensate me back $200 plus $60 in breakfast vouchers for the next morning at Land & Lake which is attached to the hotel and was a wonderful meal as well as our waiter was fantastic.

reviews.title: Excellent Hotel
reviews.text: Excellent Hotel in a great location. Friendly accommodating staff. Will stay again next time I am in Chicago.

reviews.title: Great location and access to downtown.
reviews.positives: Excellent location downtown. Easy access to shopping, Millennium Park, and the L.
reviews.negatives: Left out some Christmas gifts as we were gathering our luggage to check out and housekeeping staff had them “collected to clean up” in the 30 seconds we were in the room conversing. No one knocked to check and grateful we opened the door to catch/stop them. Do not recommend leaving *anything* outside your room for any amount of time.

reviews.title: WONDERFUL
reviews.text: GOOD. Very good location. Recommended.

reviews.title: Too expensive for the worst service I ever have
reviews.positives: Localization is good
reviews.negatives:
Staff are very rude , they didn't meet the check in time and didn’t do anything about this.
I didn’t like the service
You pay too much for the worst service . I don’t recommend this hotel .

reviews.title: Highly Recommended!
reviews.text: We recently had the pleasure of staying at LondonHouse and it was an unforgettable experience. A massive thank you to Ricky who went above and beyond to ensure our comfort and satisfaction and gave us the best view from our room. The luxurious accommodations, coupled with exceptional service, made our stay truly memorable. The hotel’s prime location made exploring the city a breeze, and I can’t wait to return to LondonHouse on ournext visit. Highly recommended!”

reviews.title: cramped but comfortable.

reviews.negatives: no dresser — where are we supposed to put our clothes? Duvee on bed is way too hot to sleep under. front desk staff was not very helpful with questions.
